value.eval: { 'group_ids': [ (4, ref('base.group_system')), (4, ref('base.group_erp_manager')), (4, ref('base.group_multi_company')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_owner')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_company_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_finance_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_finance_controller')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_hr_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_payroll_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_procurement_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_inventory_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_sales_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_project_manager')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_auditor')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.group_ecs_self_service')), ], 'company_ids': [ (4, ref('base.main_company')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.company_import_export')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.company_construction')), (4, ref('ecs_approvals.company_private_school')), ], }
